head.title: Academic Essays
head.description: Danilyn Rutherford’s essays span a wide-ranging anthropological career, from foundational research on Indonesia and colonialism to later work on disability, ethics, and contemporary social life.

intro: Here you will find formal academic works spanning research articles, commentaries, and book reviews. Material is grouped accordingly to facilitate browsing. See the [Public Anthropology](/public-anthropology) page for more accessible, public-oriented writing and media meant for a broader audience.
